Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Depositions Subpoena For Defendant'S Medical Records At San Rafael Medical Center Or In The Alternative A Protective Order
Off Calendar Apr-10-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
LINDA A. RITCHIE, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, ANDREW JACOBSON
SHAANA A. RAHMAN, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, PAUL MONTI

MATTER ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants Geralding Fern Tracy' Motion To Quash Plaintiff's Subpoena For Defendant's Medical Records At San Rafael Medical Center, or in the alternative, For A Protective Order is granted in part and denied in part. The subpoena is not quashed, but it is limited to documents and records pertaining to the care, treatment, and examination of Defendant for glaucoma from January 2001 to present. Sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Subpoena Duces Tecum For Medical Records
Off Calendar May-18-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Josua Rosen, appeared for Defendant/moving party
Shaana A. Rahman, appeared for Plaintiff/opposing party

Ruling:
Hearing held and Tentative Ruling adopted: Defendant's Motion To Enforce Defendant's Subpoena Duces Tecum For Plaintiff's Medical Records At California Pacific Medical Center is denied. The subpoena is overly broad. The facts of this case require that the subpoena be limited to the body parts injured in this incident. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
